title: pyrus variabilis
intro: Pyrus variabilis, also known as the Japanese mountain apple or variable apple, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to Japan and the Korean Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus variabilis include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Pyrus variabilis include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make medicinal products such as capsules, tablets, and tinctures.
